overall.description: A cinematic game engine shot from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a stationary first-person view of a futuristic urban commercial district. The camera overlooks a multi-lane street from an elevated walkway, focused on a large 'Passion' poster while flying vehicles and ground traffic move through the vibrant neon-lit cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated commercial walkway overlooking neon-lit downtown street

events.description: flying vehicle passes through the sky in the background from left to right
yellow taxi cab enters the frame and drives along the street below from left to right

agents.ego_description: standing stationary on an elevated platform overlooking the urban street, focused on the large Passion poster and surrounding cityscape

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab driving along the multi-lane road below, moving from left to right across the frame

entered.detail: large vertical advertisement displaying PASSION with a crown of thorns image, mounted on a weathered metal pillar in the foreground
tall commercial building with BW324 vertical signage, featuring distinctive green and pink neon paneling and large 08 numerals
futuristic curved glass skyscraper with blue reflective tint and multiple stacked levels
red-railed elevated roadway or monorail track structure curving through the left side of the scene
line of green trees and vegetation along the edge of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment presents a static elevated view of a cyberpunk city street from a sheltered walkway. The massive Passion poster dominates the foreground while the BW324 building with its vibrant neon accents stands prominently to the right. A yellow taxi drives along the road below, and flying vehicles occasionally pass through the cloudy sky above the spiral glass towers in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, elevated perspective of a futuristic commercial district, capturing the constant motion of a neon-lit urban hub. It begins from a sheltered walkway where a massive Passion poster dominates the foreground, framing the bustling street below. As the eye wanders, the view expands to the right to reveal the BW324 building with its vibrant neon accents standing prominently against the cityscape. The scene then shifts focus toward the road as a yellow taxi cruises along the multi-lane street, while flying vehicles glide through a cloudy sky above distant spiral glass towers.
